settings.name: Sugar-Free Mango
settings.note: Juicy, tropical and bright — sunshine in a bottle.

settings.name: Sugar-Free Pineapple
settings.note: Sweet, tangy and golden — the star of the set.

settings.name: Sugar-Free Peach
settings.note: Soft, mellow and warm — pure golden-hour glow.

settings.text: The mango is unreal — tastes like summer with zero sugar.
Pineapple + sparkling water = my new golden hour ritual.
Three bottles for $9.99 felt like a steal. The peach won me over.
